Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Andrea Leung (Trustee).

Mr. Schultz requested a 30-day continuance stating that they just received the accounting schedules on Friday. Status on filing of the fourth account is continued to May 6, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3075 24th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca., 94132)
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Andrea Leung.

The sale was confirmed at $1,670,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,013,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Saelee. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Schultz for and with Andrea Leung (Trust).
Jeffrey Wang in Propria Persona.

The Court informed Mr. Wang that objections need to be in writing, in proper format and served on all parties. Mr. Wang expressed his concerns, presented oral argument and asked to vacate sail of the house. Mr. Schultz stated that he is fine with the Court reducing fees with respect to cancellation of the magazine subscriptions. Ms. Leung stated that the Conservatee pays $5,000.00 a month for room and board which is far less than what she would pay if placed in any licensed facility, that $300.00 is for the meal plan, that Ms. Wang had a team of Caregivers when she lived at her house, that the Caregivers remained and that the Conservatee enjoys cultural foods. Mr. Schultz stated that this case has been in Court since 2011, that the Trust was created in 2004, that it is a revocable trust for the benefit of King Wang, and that it has been used to provide for Ms. Wang's care and for keeping Ms. Wang and Jeffrey in the house. Mr. Schultz also stated that the reverse mortgage funds have been exhausted and that the house now needs to be sold. The Third Account and Report of Successor Trustee, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Explanation Of Failure To File Account As Ordered
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Continued To Jan-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: Conservatorship of King Chuan Wang PCN-11-294794 and The King C. Wang Trust PTR-11-294968.

Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Andrea Leung.

Mr. Schultz stated that the conservatorship accounting was filed yesterday with a hearing date of January 31, 2018 and that the trust accounting is being e-filed today. Status on filing of the accounting in the conservatorship matter is off calendar. Status on filing of the accounting in the trust matter is continued to January 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
